title: 24'' Round Granite White Plastic Folding Table
features: This petite commercial grade table can be used in banquet halls, cafeterias, or in the home.
This granite white round plastic table is a great solution for temporary setups for displaying food or other small items.
This dining height 24'' Round Folding Table features a durable stain resistant blow molded top and sturdy frame.
The blow molded top requires low maintenance and cleans easily.
The table legs fold easily when no longer needed.
